'We can't justify a £52 lunch': Middle-income families cut back on days out A household with an average income of £55,000 has cut spending on leisure activities by £40 a week, offical figures suggest. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg3g11z6d8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckg3g11z6d8o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 06:03:22 GMT
How an island became first in the world to eradicate ferretsMore than 400 traps were laid across the island in a £4.5m project which featured a specially-trained detection dog called Woody. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cre1jly1ny2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cre1jly1ny2o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 00:00:16 GMT
Hospital apology over boy's death after trainee doctor pierced arteryThree-year-old Aarav Chopra died during a biopsy when his artery was pierced by a trainee doctor. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cddnv945g2po?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cddnv945g2po#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 03:01:09 GMT
Ryan Gosling's Project Hail Mary becomes 2026's biggest box office debutThe sci-fi space adventure movie rockets to $140.9 million (£122m) at the global box office. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5y7gxqpplvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5y7gxqpplvo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 12:31:29 GMT
HS2 train speeds could be cut to save moneyThe government is looking at ways to make much-delayed London to Birmingham railway line cheaper to deliver. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czex3lj077xo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czex3lj077xo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 11:21:02 GMT

Heat pumps work for me - but they're not yet a money saverThe government wants Britons to embrace heat pumps. But will they ever make financial sense for the average user? https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce358gkx9vpo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce358gkx9vpo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 00:04:45 GMT
British couple in Iran prison say situation is 'life-threatening'Craig and Lindsay Foreman are being held in Tehran's Evin prison amid ongoing attacks on Iran. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew72ll8245o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew72ll8245o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 06:11:00 GMT
UN warns Earth's climate being 'pushed beyond its limits' as El Niño loomsThe Earth's climate is further out of balance than at any time in recorded history, the UN's weather agency says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c203rdxkezwo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c203rdxkezwo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 04:06:22 GMT
Oil falls and shares rebound after Trump says talks have been held to end warEnergy prices fall and stock markets rebound after the US president says "very good and productive" talks have been held. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czex56kwxxzo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czex56kwxxzo#1 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 12:27:28 GMT
Why did US and Israel attack Iran and how long could the war last?Conflict has spread across the Middle East since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran on 28 February. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2dyz6p3weo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2dyz6p3weo#1 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 21:15:58 GMT
